name: Civic Harmony Hall
summary: Shared administrative and short-term detention hall for fines, bounties, inquiries, and mediation across the Principalities.
day_to_day: Processes fines and bounties, records legal transactions, mediates disputes, and holds offenders short-term.
who_works_there: Clerks, guards, arbiters, record keepers, shrine attendants.
who_uses_it: Travelers, bounty hunters, merchants, offenders, and local residents with disputes or legal business.
authority: Administrative and detention authority under shared civic law; can hold suspects and process penalties.
public_manifestation: Busy counters, bannered halls, legal murals, armories, and guarded holding cells.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Festival surges, inter-house tension, and magical detainees strain the ideal of balanced justice.
